Title: CLS on home page (post-paint)
Preconditions:
- Storefront accessible
- Cache disabled
- Network throttled to Fast 3G (image load is the typical shift culprit)
- TIMING NOTE: PerformanceObserver cannot run before first paint via MCP; this test measures post-DOMContentLoaded CLS only. Pre-paint shifts are under-counted by design (documented in scripts/lib/measure-layout.ts).
Assertions:
[MATH] cls <= 0.1 PASS
[MATH] 0.1 <= cls < 0.25 FAIL
[MATH] cls >= 0.25 P0
[STATE] shiftCount recorded for evidence
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during initial render
[NETWORK] no failed image requests (HTTP 4xx/5xx) for hero .slider-block images
Failure_Signals: cls >= 0.1; hero .slider-block swiper images lack width/height; webfont swap reflows .vc-typography elements; .products-block products grid shifts when 20-card grid resolves

Title: CLS on PDP (image-load reflow)
Preconditions:
- Long-title stress product is in catalog (`@td(STRESS.longTitleSku)` = 8033482, slug `@td(STRESS.longTitleSlug)`)
- Cache disabled
- TIMING NOTE: post-paint CLS only (see CLS-001)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}@td(STRESS.longTitleSlug)
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.installClsObserver immediately after navigation
[WAIT] Wait for `.image-gallery__img--active` to fully load (verify naturalWidth > 0 via evaluate)
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.triggerReflowProbe
[WAIT] 1s
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.readCls
Assertions:
[MATH] cls <= 0.1 PASS
[STATE] capture {cls, shiftCount}
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no errors
[NETWORK] gallery images return 200; `.image-gallery .swiper-wrapper .image-gallery__thumb` requests succeed
Failure_Signals: cls >= 0.1 on PDP load; .image-gallery main image lacks intrinsic dimensions causing .product-price-block to jump; long .vc-typography H1 reflows after webfont

Title: No neighbor-input shift on inline validation error
Preconditions:
- A storefront form with required-field validation. TENTATIVE selectors: sign-up form at /sign-up uses `.vc-input` wrapper pattern (storefront-selectors.md Section 6 — flagged as NOT live-verified; re-verify in incognito context before relying on this case)
- For BL-UI-003 strict, this test measures whether INSERTING a validation message under field A shifts field B (a sibling input below). It does NOT measure CTA-jump distance (that is a Nielsen #1 UX concern, not BL-UI-003).
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-up (in incognito / fresh context — otherwise auth redirect to /catalog)
[WAIT] Form rendered (multiple `.vc-input` wrappers)
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` rectSnapshotSnippet to capture rect of the SECOND form input (sibling below first) — capture as `before`
[ACT] Focus first input, leave it empty, blur (or submit form) to trigger validation on first input
[WAIT] `.vc-input--error` class appears on first input wrapper AND `.vc-input-details:not(.vc-input-details--hide-empty)` message renders
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` rectSnapshotSnippet on second input — capture as `after`
[ACT] compareRectSnapshots(before, after); classify
Assertions:
[STATE] topDelta === 0 (neighbor input must not move when error message inserts above)
[STATE] If form is designed to grow vertically: that's allowed; this test measures specifically whether ADJACENT siblings move. CTA jumps below are filed separately as Nielsen #1 (severity 2-3).
Failure_Signals: Inserting validation error pushes sibling input down; form grows non-deterministically as errors appear

Title: Font swap reflow — webfont load does not cause CLS
Preconditions:
- Webfonts are loaded via @font-face on home page
- Cache disabled to force webfont fetch
- TIMING NOTE: post-paint CLS only; font-display setting affects whether FOIT or FOUT is observed
Steps:
[ACT] Clear browser cache + disable cache
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.installClsObserver immediately
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` FOUC_SNIPPET; record `fontFamiliesInUse` and `fontReady` immediately
[WAIT] Wait for `document.fonts.ready` to resolve (via evaluate: `await document.fonts.ready` then return status)
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` FOUC_SNIPPET again; record post-load font state
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.readCls
Assertions:
[MATH] cls <= 0.1 PASS (font swap should contribute ≈0 if font-display: optional or proper sizing)
[STATE] post-load fontFamiliesInUse contains expected Coffee fonts (NOT serif/system fallback)
[STATE] fontReady === 'loaded' OR true after document.fonts.ready resolves

[CONSOLE] no errors

Failure_Signals: cls >= 0.1 attributable to text reflow as webfont arrives; pre-load fontFamiliesInUse shows generic fallback (Times, Arial); font-display: block causing invisible text during FOIT

- Cache disabled to force skeleton render
- Viewport 375×812
- TIMING NOTE: post-paint CLS only (see CLS-001 note). Pre-paint shifts are under-counted by design (documented in scripts/lib/measure-layout.ts).
Steps:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[ACT] Set viewport to 375×812
[ACT] Disable browser cache (or use hard-reload equivalent via evaluate)
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/lists
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.installClsObserver IMMEDIATELY after navigation (buffered:true)
[WAIT] Wait for `.wishlist-products-skeleton` or `.vc-widget-skeleton` to appear (skeleton phase)
[WAIT] Wait for skeleton to be replaced by `.vc-product-card` or `.wishlist-card` grid (content phase), then wait further 5s after network idle
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.triggerReflowProbe to surface lazy shifts
[WAIT] 1s
[ACT] `browser_evaluate` LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.readCls; capture {cls, shiftCount}
Assertions:
[MATH] cls <= 0.1 PASS — regression fix verified for skeleton height mismatch (VCST-5110)
[MATH] cls >= 0.25 P0 FAIL (was 0.483 before fix — skeleton height calibrated for desktop flex-row, not mobile stacked layout)
[STATE] shiftCount recorded for evidence
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during skeleton-to-grid swap
[NETWORK] GetWishlists xAPI query returns 200; errors[] empty
Failure_Signals: cls >= 0.1 after fix (skeleton height still mismatched at 375 px); shiftCount > 0 attributed to wishlist-card grid swap; CLS spikes above 0.25 (P0); LAYOUT_SNIPPETS.installClsObserver returns undefined (observer not installed before navigation)
Cleanup: none — no state side effects (observer only)
